fault_hypothesis: On line 66, the mean is computed by dividing by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series is shorter than the window, `tail` has fewer elements than `window`, so dividing by `window` under-counts the average.

constraints.intent: After computing mean, it should equal total divided by the actual tail length, not window.
mean__1 times actual tail length must equal total__1 when tail is non-empty.

spec.expr: len(tail__1) == window or abs(mean__1 - total__1 / len(tail__1)) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: Before using mean__1 in the return, verify it was computed using the actual tail length when tail is shorter than window.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or abs(__cbfl_result - sum(values[-window:]) / len(values[-window:])) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: The returned value must equal the true mean of the tail slice, not total divided by window.
